description: Local-only Agentlas ontology recall at session start and point of need.

hooks.command: if [ -x "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/agentlas-memory-hook" ]; then "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/agentlas-memory-hook" --host claude --event SessionStart; else printf '{}\n'; fi
if [ -x "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/agentlas-memory-hook" ]; then "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/agentlas-memory-hook" --host claude --event UserPromptSubmit; else printf '{}\n'; fi
